# Starknet Thesis

An independent research thesis arguing that Starknet differentiates on three pillars: privacy (private transfers, swaps and balances via the STRK20 standard), quantum security (a STARK proving system that is post-quantum by design, with full end-to-end resistance on a committed roadmap), and BTCFi (Bitcoin staking and DeFi, with BTC stakers taking a fixed 25% share of staking rewards). Written by Lyskey, a StarkWare communications employee, in a personal capacity. The site's own disclosure: "Website made for educational purposes only. This is not financial advice. Always DYOR. This is also a personal project, not affiliated with or endorsed by StarkWare. All views expressed here are my own." The site also includes a live STRK data dashboard fed by free public APIs and onchain reads.

## Pages

- [Overview](https://starknetthesis.io/): the thesis in one page — why privacy, quantum security and BTCFi converge on Starknet, and what STRK represents.
- [The Privacy Thesis](https://starknetthesis.io/privacy.html): argues crypto's radical transparency harms users, and documents STRK20 — Starknet's standard for private transfers, swaps and balances — with live shielded-pool metrics.
- [The Quantum Thesis](https://starknetthesis.io/quantum.html): argues Starknet is best positioned for the post-quantum era; its STARK proving system is post-quantum by design, and full end-to-end quantum resistance is on a committed roadmap. Claims are deliberately precise; no overclaiming.
- [The Bitcoin Thesis (BTCFi)](https://starknetthesis.io/btcfi.html): how Starknet makes BTC productive — bridged BTC representations, Bitcoin staking with a fixed 25% reward share, strkBTC — with live figures for bridged, staked and shielded BTC.
- [STRK Dashboard](https://starknetthesis.io/strk.html): live STRK metrics — price, market cap, staking (STRK and BTC, with monthly history reconstructed from onchain state at historical blocks), TVL, TVS, stablecoins, users, transactions, revenue, and STRK20 privacy figures — plus tokenomics: circulating supply, the contractual unlock schedule, and the official allocation.
- [Ecosystem](https://starknetthesis.io/ecosystem.html): a directory of who to follow across the Starknet ecosystem — official accounts, StarkWare and Foundation voices, builders and community figures.
- [Digest](https://starknetthesis.io/digest.html): weekly roundups, monthly digests and research notes on the Starknet ecosystem, from the Starknet Research newsletter.

## Notes

- Metric values shown on the dashboard are fetched client-side from free public sources (CoinGecko, DefiLlama, L2Beat, growthepie, Binance, npm, the Endur API, Starknet RPC, and the STRK20 backend); pages ship with real seeded values as static fallbacks.
- Historical staking series are reconstructed from Starknet contract state at past blocks and committed as JSON in the repository.
